data.name: SEX HENTAI VR
data.detailed_description:
In the cave there are three girls turned into stone.
During the game you move around the cave using a teleport.
There are three kinds of magic stones in somehow.
If you collect four stones of one type, you can use them to remove the curse from one of the girls.

The girl will be very grateful to you for freeing her.
She will want to give you a reward.

The game is for adults only.

英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970 (or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 3000 MB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
